payload.answer: No durable memory committed for article content because the fetch failed and no source claims were available to store.

entity_resolution.reason: The input does not provide a resolvable or trustworthy source entity beyond a malformed-looking URL reference and a failed fetch result.

memory_cards.statement: A fetch attempt for the provided article URL resulted in a 404 network error; no article content was उपलब्ध/available from the input.

details: Source fetch failed with 404 network error.
No article content was available, so no substantive memory was created.

repair_options: Retry with a valid, accessible URL.
Provide the article text or a successful fetch result.
If you want to remember the fetch failure itself, confirm that as the intended memory.
